name: multi_turn_templating_workspace
description: Demonstrates the workspace-bound templating fields `{{prev.git_diff}}` and `{{prev.tool_sequence}}`. Turn 0 edits the workspace (producing a non-empty git diff and at least one tool call); Turn 1 references both fields to prove the runner spliced the actual values into the prompt. Together with `correctness/multi_turn_templating.json` (which covers `{{prev.reply_text}}` and `{{turn_N.reply_text}}`), these two scenarios exercise every declared `_TEMPLATE_FIELDS` entry in `runner/orchestrator.py`. Tagged `dry-run-only` because the workspace-editing turn is brittle on offline CI but exercises end-to-end locally; `tests/test_templating_parity.py` enforces the parity statically so the contract holds in CI regardless.

turns.message: Create a new file at the repository root named templating_demo.md whose only contents is the line: hello-from-templating-demo. Do not modify any other file. Reply with just the filename you created.
